page.title: Export shipments
page.subtitle: Every consignment and its document pack. A doc cannot issue until its prerequisites are met.

empty.title: No shipments yet
empty.description: Build a consignment from a signed contract to start its export document pack.

build.title: Build a shipment
build.subtitle: Pick a signed contract. A consignment number is minted for you.
build.noContracts: No signed contracts to ship yet. Sign a contract first.

detail.title: Shipment {shipmentNo}
detail.subtitle: Load the contract lines, then issue the five-document pack in order.

lines.title: Loaded lines
lines.empty: No lines loaded yet. Add a contract line to claim its bags.
lines.lockedNote: Lines can only be loaded while a shipment is still building.
lines.noLoadable: Every contract line is already loaded.

pack.title: Document pack
pack.subtitle: Red means a prerequisite is unmet. Green means issued. The bill of lading unlocks only after the other four.
pack.allClear: All five documents are clear to issue.
pack.someBlocked: Some documents are still blocked by their prerequisites.
pack.noLines: Load at least one contract line before issuing documents.

errors.generic: Could not complete that. Check the details and try again.
errors.contractRequired: Select a contract to build the shipment.
errors.bagsPositive: Enter a bag count greater than zero.
errors.bagWeightPositive: Bag weight must be greater than zero.
errors.shipmentRequired: That shipment could not be found.
errors.lineRequired: Select a contract line to load.
errors.access: You do not have access to this shipment.
